pageSubtitle: {userName}, here is the operational view of {orgName}: scope, progress, upcoming milestones, and quick links for execution without leaving the active tenant.

hero.title: A cockpit to turn services into trackable deliveries
hero.description: The screen now consolidates pipeline, projected revenue, milestones, and attention points. Data still comes from the server based on the active organization and does not depend on `orgId` sent by the client.

shortcuts.title: Useful shortcuts
shortcuts.clientsDescription: Use the current client base to define owners and contacts.
shortcuts.servicesDescription: Open the detailed operation to edit scope, status, and schedules.
shortcuts.dashboardDescription: Track general indicators and capacity of the active tenant.
shortcuts.settingsDescription: Adjust language and panel appearance before aligning the workflow with the team.

currentProjects.title: Current projects
currentProjects.subtitle: The list below respects the current page filters.
currentProjects.empty: No projects found with the current filters.

attention.title: Attention points
attention.empty: No critical items in the current view.
